sections.heading: PART II Statement of Policy
sections.summary: Defines policy sections for cybersecurity in banking sector including purpose, scope, responsibility, and cyber risk examples.
sections.source_quote: PART II Statement of Policy 2.1 Purpose 2.2 Scope 2:3 Responsibility 2.4 Examples of Sources of Cyber Risk

sections.heading: PART III Specific Requirements
sections.summary: Board and senior management must establish cybersecurity strategy, policies, and frameworks; ensure oversight, budget allocation, and regular reviews of cybersecurity readiness.
sections.dtia_summary: Requires institutions to define cybersecurity governance structures, risk ownership, and accountability for cyber threats within banking operations.

requirements.text: Board of Directors must oversee cybersecurity strategy, risk appetite, and strategic direction
Board must review cybersecurity preparedness against cyber risks annually
Senior Management must implement cybersecurity strategy and ensure business continuity
CISO must report cybersecurity status quarterly to CEO

sections.source_quote: Board of Directors must oversee cultivation of ethical governance culture, establish cyber risk appetite, allocate cybersecurity budget, and review cybersecurity preparedness annually.
